content.text: Found the roadmap, risk register, and project status. I'll pull those together to draft the Q3 risk summary.

content.content:
Project Helios — Q3 Roadmap
INTERNAL DRAFT — Not for client distribution
Last updated: 2026-07-06

Q3 2026 Priorities:

1. COMPLETE SYSTEM INTEGRATION (July)
   - Finalize data ingestion module (target: 2026-07-18)
   - Complete client dashboard v1 (target: 2026-07-22)
   - Integration test sign-off (target: 2026-07-25)

2. PRODUCT DEMO FOR MERIDIAN (July 25)
   - Live data ingestion demonstration using Meridian sample data
   - End-to-end pipeline walkthrough
   - Dashboard visualization with real data (per contract Section 9.3)

3. USER ACCEPTANCE TESTING — MERIDIAN GROUP (August 17-28)
   - Deploy to UAT environment
   - Support Meridian user testing sessions
   - Address UAT feedback (budget: 2 sprints)

4. PERFORMANCE HARDENING (August-September)
   - Dashboard load time target: <2 seconds for 100k records
   - Ingestion throughput benchmarking (target: 500k records/min sustained)
   - External security penetration test (vendor TBD)

5. LAUNCH PREPARATION (September)
   - Production environment setup and runbook documentation
   - Hypercare plan finalization (30-day post-launch model)
   - Final client training sessions

Target launch date: 2026-10-01
Key risk: UAT slippage of >2 weeks pushes launch into Q4, triggering Section 7.1 penalty review.

Proposed Q3 feature additions (subject to change control approval):
- Scheduled ingestion jobs (cron-based triggers)
- Email alerting for pipeline failures
- Self-service mapping rule editor (deferred from Q2)

Project Helios — Risk Register
Last reviewed: 2026-07-07 | Owner: Sarah Chen (PM)

ID    Risk Description                             Likelihood  Impact  Score  Mitigation Owner    Status
----  -------------------------------------------  ----------  ------  -----  ------------------  --------
R-01  Meridian source data quality issues           High        High    9      Amir Hassan         Active — date format blocker confirmed in sprint 14
R-02  GeoSync license not renewed before demo       Medium      High    6      Raj Patel           Active — legal review in progress, due 2026-07-14
R-03  Dashboard performance on large datasets       Medium      High    6      Derek Okafor        Active — benchmark task HEL-247 not yet started
R-04  UAT timeline slippage                        High        Medium  6      Sarah Chen          Active — 1-week extension already consumed
R-05  Key person dependency: Derek Okafor           Low         High    3      Sarah Chen          Monitored — no backup tech lead identified
R-06  Meridian IT environment access delays        Medium      Medium  4      Nadia Petrov        Active — awaiting IT infrastructure diagram
R-07  Scope creep from Meridian feature requests   Low         Medium  2      Raj Patel           Monitored — 3 informal requests logged, not yet escalated
R-08  Cloud cost overrun                           Low         Low     1      Nadia Petrov        Monitored
R-09  Third-party API deprecation (non-GeoSync)    Very Low    Medium  1      Olivia Brooks       Monitored

Project Helios — Weekly Status Update
Week of 2026-07-06

Overall: ON TRACK (minor risks)

Milestone Progress:
- Data ingestion module: 85% complete
- API gateway: 100% complete (delivered)
- Client dashboard: 60% complete
- Integration testing: 40% complete

Sprint 14 Goals:
- Complete dashboard module v1
- Resolve data format inconsistencies (Blocker #1)
- Begin UAT preparation

Open Blockers:
1. Meridian source data contains inconsistent date formats (ISO 8601 vs. MM/DD/YYYY).
   Dev team awaiting clarification from Meridian IT. Estimated delay: 2-3 days.
2. Third-party mapping library (GeoSync v2.1) license renewal pending. Legal reviewing.
   Target resolution: 2026-07-14.

Next milestone: Integration Test Sign-off — target 2026-07-25

content.text: I've mapped the key Q3 risks to the current project situation. Now I'll draft the summary document.

input.content:
Project Helios — Q3 2026 Risk Summary
Date: 2026-07-08 | Owner: PMO (Sarah Chen)
Classification: Internal

Overview:
This summary maps the top risks from the active risk register (reviewed 2026-07-07) to the Q3 roadmap (draft 2026-07-06) and current project situation per weekly status week of 2026-07-06. Overall status remains ON TRACK (minor risks) with four critical-path risks requiring active management before the July 25 Meridian demo and Oct 1 launch target.

Q3 Roadmap Critical Path: System Integration (July) -> Product Demo for Meridian (July 25) -> UAT Aug 17-28 -> Performance Hardening Aug-Sep -> Launch Prep Sep -> Launch Oct 1. Note: UAT slippage >2 weeks triggers Section 7.1 penalty review per roadmap.

Top Risks:

1. [R-01] Meridian Source Data Quality Issues | Likelihood: High, Impact: High, Score: 9 | Status: Active
   Roadmap Mapping: Directly threatens (1) COMPLETE SYSTEM INTEGRATION - Finalize data ingestion module (due 2026-07-18) and (2) PRODUCT DEMO FOR MERIDIAN - live ingestion and dashboard visualization with real data per contract Section 9.3.
   Current Situation: Data ingestion module 85% complete but blocked. Blocker #1 confirmed: Meridian source data contains inconsistent date formats (ISO 8601 vs MM/DD/YYYY). Dev team awaiting clarification from Meridian IT, estimated 2-3 day delay. This is the highest-scoring risk.
   Mitigation: Owner Amir Hassan. Escalate to Meridian IT for format standardization, implement defensive parsing as interim.

2. [R-02] GeoSync License Not Renewed Before Demo | Likelihood: Medium, Impact: High, Score: 6 | Status: Active
   Roadmap Mapping: Threatens Integration Test Sign-off (target 2026-07-25) and Product Demo for Meridian (July 25). Third-party mapping library is in demo critical path.
   Current Situation: Blocker #2 - GeoSync v2.1 license renewal pending. Legal review in progress, target resolution 2026-07-14. This leaves 11 days buffer before sign-off/demo.
   Mitigation: Owner Raj Patel. Daily check-in with Legal, prepare fallback to trial license or mock mapping for demo if not resolved by 2026-07-14.

3. [R-03] Dashboard Performance on Large Datasets | Likelihood: Medium, Impact: High, Score: 6 | Status: Active
   Roadmap Mapping: Directly threatens (4) PERFORMANCE HARDENING - Dashboard load time <2 sec for 100k records and ingestion throughput 500k/min, plus external pen test readiness.
   Current Situation: Client dashboard 60% complete, Integration testing 40% complete. Benchmark task HEL-247 not yet started. No evidence yet that <2 sec target is achievable. Risk will become critical in August when UAT data volumes increase.
   Mitigation: Owner Derek Okafor. Start HEL-247 immediately post sprint 14, prioritize performance profiling in July build.

4. [R-04] UAT Timeline Slippage | Likelihood: High, Impact: Medium, Score: 6 | Status: Active
   Roadmap Mapping: Threatens (3) USER ACCEPTANCE TESTING Aug 17-28 and (5) Launch Preparation Sep, with cascading impact to Target Launch Oct 1.
   Current Situation: 1-week extension already consumed per risk register. System Integration delays from R-01/R-02 compress buffer before UAT entry. Integration test sign-off still targeted for 2026-07-25. Any additional slippage >2 weeks pushes launch to Q4 and triggers contract Section 7.1 penalty review.
   Mitigation: Owner Sarah Chen. Protect July 25 sign-off date, re-sequence non-critical tasks, confirm Meridian UAT resource availability early, and prepare change control for feature additions (scheduled jobs, email alerting).

Watch List:
- [R-05] Key person dependency: Derek Okafor (Low/High, Score 3) - No backup tech lead identified; impacts dashboard and performance work.
- [R-06] Meridian IT environment access delays (Medium/Medium, Score 4) - Awaiting IT infrastructure diagram; could affect UAT deployment.

Recommendation for Q3 Planning:
Focus July on unblocking R-01 and R-02 to protect July 25 demo. Freeze scope on proposed Q3 additions pending resolution. Initiate performance benchmarking in July vs. August to de-risk launch.

content.text:
Q3 risk summary completed and saved as **q3_risk_summary.txt**.

The summary identifies the top 4 active risks (R-01 to R-04, Score 6-9) from the risk register and maps each to the Q3 roadmap milestones and current project situation from the weekly status:

- **R-01 Data quality** → Threatens July 18 ingestion module & July 25 demo; 85% complete but blocked by date format issue (2-3 day delay)
- **R-02 GeoSync license** → Threatens July 25 sign-off/demo; legal review due July 14
- **R-03 Dashboard performance** → Threatens Aug-Sep hardening targets (<2s/100k); HEL-247 not started, dashboard 60% complete
- **R-04 UAT slippage** → Threatens Aug 17-28 UAT and Oct 1 launch; 1-week extension already consumed, >2 week slip triggers penalty review
